mapper.sql: id, username, amount_fen, model_name, input_tokens, output_tokens, retry_count, last_error, status, resolved_by, resolved_at, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_billing_dlq_log (username, amount_fen, model_name, input_tokens, output_tokens, retry_count, last_error, status, created_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{amountFen}, #{modelName}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{retryCount}, #{lastError}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM agent_billing_dlq_log ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM agent_billing_dlq_log WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent_billing_dlq_log WHERE status = 'pending'
